triples.subject: China
triples.object: the electric vehicle (EV) and EV battery industries
triples.sentence: China is at the global forefront of the electric vehicle (EV) and EV battery industries.

triples.subject: Chinese firms
triples.object: nearly two-thirds of the world’s EVs
triples.sentence: Its firms produce nearly two-thirds of the world’s EVs and more than three-quarters of EV batteries.

triples.subject: BYD
triples.object: 17 percent of the global BEV market
triples.sentence: BYD with 17 percent, GAC Aion with 5.2 percent, SAIC-GM-Wuling with 4.9 percent, and Volkswagen with 4.6 percent.

triples.subject: China
triples.object: $230.9 billion in subsidies and other support to its domestic EV sector
triples.sentence: From 2009 to 2023 alone, China channeled $230.9 billion in subsidies and other support to its domestic EV sector.

triples.subject: American consumers
triples.object: more than $1 billion in upfront costs on their purchase of more than 150,000 clean vehicles
triples.sentence: Department of the Treasury and Internal Revenue Service announced that American consumers had saved more than $1 billion in upfront costs on their purchase of more than 150,000 clean vehicles since January 1, 2024.
